patent.title: Prosthetic Arm Device
patent.abstract: A prosthetic arm device with improved grip strength and neural feedback.

description.p: The present invention relates to prosthetic arm devices.
More specifically, it provides improved grip strength through a novel actuator mechanism.

claims.claim: A prosthetic arm device comprising: a grip actuator; a neural interface sensor; and a feedback controller.
The device of claim 1, wherein the grip actuator comprises a piezoelectric element.
The device of claim 1, further comprising a wrist rotation mechanism.
